hero.title: Plans & Pricing
hero.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your workflow, then scale with flexible token packs whenever your team needs extra AI throughput.

payg.name: Pay-as-you-go
payg.description: Our most flexible option for webmasters and small teams. Pay only for the fixes and analyses you need — perfect for emerging sites or occasional maintenance without a monthly commitment.
payg.bestFor: Webmasters, small teams, and new projects.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlimited AI repairs, builds, and analysis tools. Ideal for developers, freelancers, and organizations managing one or more sites. Full power without limits.

agency.name: Agency
agency.description: Built for agencies and professionals managing multiple client sites. Includes client-ready white-label reports, priority processing, and advanced collaboration features.
agency.bestFor: Agencies, studios, and professionals managing multiple client sites.

tokenPacks.title: Token Packs
tokenPacks.subtitle: Buy tokens on demand and keep AI operations moving with no subscription lock-in.

microcopy.unlimitedRepairs: Unlimited repairs: Run as many AI fixes as you need without limits.
microcopy.unlimitedBuilds: Unlimited builds: Generate new components, pages, and code with no usage cap.
microcopy.priorityQueue: Priority queue: Your tasks are processed faster during peak times.
microcopy.whiteLabelReports: White-label reports: Export client-ready reports with your own branding.
microcopy.tokenUsage: Token usage: Tokens are consumed when running AI operations.
microcopy.tokenPackUsage: Tokens are consumed when running AI repairs, builds, or advanced analyses.

footnotes.fairUse: Unlimited usage is subject to fair-use guidelines.
footnotes.tokenComplexity: Token consumption varies by operation complexity.

q1.question: How do tokens work?
q1.answer: Tokens are used to pay for AI-powered repairs, builds, and advanced analyses. Each operation consumes a specific number of tokens based on complexity.

q2.question: Can I switch plans later?
q2.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.

q3.question: Do my tokens expire?
q3.answer: Tokens do not expire within the current billing year. We’ll notify you well in advance if this changes.

q4.question: Can I use token packs on any plan?
q4.answer: Yes. Token packs work with all plans, including Pay-as-you-go.
